data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of per-order license key issuance and status tracking, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or endpoints that confirm this functionality. The linked use case specifies the need for this feature, yet there is no evidence of its implementation or validation in the prior steps. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of per-order license key issuance and status tracking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the per-order license key issuance and status tracking.
